---
description: "Auto-invoke UI UX Pro Max for UI/UX work in VS Code Copilot — build, design, create, implement, review, fix, improve interfaces, layouts, components, dashboards, landing pages, forms, styling, accessibility."
applyTo: ["**/*.{tsx,jsx,vue,css,scss,less,html}", "src/components/**", "src/pages/**", "src/views/**", "packages/web/**"]
---
# UI UX Pro Max (Copilot / VS Code)

For any UI or UX task, **before generating code**:

1. Read and follow `.github/prompts/ui-ux-pro-max/PROMPT.md`.
2. Run design-system search scripts from that folder when the prompt instructs.
3. Apply the design system output, anti-patterns checklist, and stack rules from the prompt.

Treat this the same as Cursor Agent Skills auto-invocation — do not produce UI code without consulting the prompt first.

Trigger phrases: build, design, create, implement, review, fix, improve, layout, component, page, screen, modal, form, dashboard, landing, polish, restyle, accessibility.
